title: The Sephirothic System in EoE
wikitext:
[]: The Sephirothic System in EoE Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:03 pm This thread is to discuss the signifigance of the placement of the Seraphetic System in EoE. Now Unit-01, with Shinji was in the middle of it. This is what makes it signifigant. The Seraphetic System was not only supposed to the the very design of the divine path, but it was also supposed be a diagram of the first human Adam. Now Shinji placed in the center sets him up as the new Adam (not as in the angel, but the biblical character.), which later sets us up for the scene on the beach, asserting Asuka as the new Eve. This can also give us a greater understanding of her bitchy (hey, its the best descriptive term) behavior during the series, which represented her as also being a new lilith. So this part of EoE was meant to drive home the name of the series. It literally made it a new gensis. So lets discuss this idea, its good food for thought. Lets also put forward different theories about the signifigance of the appearance of this symbol.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:15 pm I think you mean Sephirothic System... Your conclusions need MOAR SAUCE, as they say. We like to see more specifics and actual citations. You haven't even provided the name of the Sephirah in question, yet you're speculating wildly about the ramifications of Eva-01/Shinji appearing there in EoE? For the record, it's Tiphareth. (Does Kabbalic literature associate that sphere with Adam Kadmon, or is that your own idea?) If we "give" that Sephirah to Yui instead of Shinji, it actually seems that every Sephirah on the central pillar of the Tree is associated with a member of the "Ikari Family" somewhere during the course of the show. - Gendo's desk is beneath Kether. - When Shinji encounters Gendo in #19, he stands beneath Yesod. (I probably need to double-check this.) - Rei soaks in Malkuth in #25'. - And Eva-01 (Yui) is placed at Tiphareth. There, that's a little more substance to work with. Also. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7372 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7028 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1505 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1030 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=48

We like to see more specifics and actual citations. You haven't even provided the name of the Sephirah in question, yet you're speculating wildly about the ramifications of Eva-01/Shinji appearing there in EoE? For the record, it's Tiphareth. (Does Kabbalic literature associate that sphere with Adam Kadmon, or is that your own idea?) If we "give" that Sephirah to Yui instead of Shinji, it actually seems that every Sephirah on the central pillar of the Tree is associated with a member of the "Ikari Family" somewhere during the course of the show. - Gendo's desk is beneath Kether. - When Shinji encounters Gendo in #19, he stands beneath Yesod. (I probably need to double-check this.) - Rei soaks in Malkuth in #25'. - And Eva-01 (Yui) is placed at Tiphareth. There, that's a little more substance to work with.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:23 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Well lets face it, I have classes. Trust me, if I had time I would be more detailed, but I'll let you all fill in the blanks.

[]: Post by Legendary » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:24 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Trust me, if I had time I would be more detailed, but I'll let you all fill in the blanks.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:29 pm Legendary wrote: Then maybe you should focus on those.

[]: Post by Xard » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:32 pm I must admit someone posting in here is propably most pretentious, pseudo-intellectual idiot I've encountered in ages. I'm not giving any names though

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:42 pm I must admit someone else in here who posted is a real prick, and seems to be neglecting an order given by a moderator. I must also say, that individual is an irreconcilable twit who seems to me to be a total waste of air.

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 22, 2010 6:42 pm Yeah, I think this thread is done already.
